sheet_rules.description: Master-sheet rows are already admitted as canonical load rows, even when the underlying source is a structured official page rather than a raw PDF.

expected_database_load_values: No - direct file capture queue only
sheet_rules.description: Queue rows stay non-load until a direct file, structured export, or explicit exclusion decision promotes or resolves them.

deferred_queue_reason_values: Box planning record cannot be represented as row-level document sources without export.
Box/Pinyon folder cannot be represented as row-level document sources without export.
Forest plan support row needs direct document file URL
Reading-room widget/static page does not expose every direct file row in this environment.
SCC page lists animal and plant rationale files; direct stable file links were not exposed/verified.
SCC page lists animal and plant rationale XLSX files; direct stable file links were not exposed/verified.
SCC page lists terrestrial animal, aquatic animal, and botanical rationale files; direct stable file links were not exposed/verified.
Specific FEIS volume listed on official page but direct file URL unresolved.
deferred_resolution_patterns: Replace source page/folder/manual placeholder with direct document/file URL; then promote to Document_Register_Master if necessary.
Use browser/Pinyon/Box/page download or manual export to capture the exact file, final URL, file type, date, and hash.
Export reading-room file list; add any remaining actual documents as direct rows or document exclusion rationale.
Download/export FEIS, ROD, BA/BO, appendices, maps/GIS, objection/decision documents, and any final support files from Pinyon/Box/widget. Promote direct files to Document_Register_Master.
Capture direct media/file URL for FEIS Volume 3 or confirm exclusion with direct source evidence.
Capture direct media/file URL for FEIS Volume 4 or confirm exclusion with direct source evidence.
Capture direct media/file URL for FEIS Volume 5 or confirm exclusion with direct source evidence.
Export Pinyon folder; add each document/data layer as direct row with date/version/hash.
Export Box planning record; add each public document/data layer as direct row with date/version/hash.
Export folder manifest and convert each public file to direct database-load source rows.
